---
title: "Paper and downloads"
---

## Paper

This website accompanies a paper on statistical significance and severity analysis in follow-on damages cases.

[Download the paper](downloads/paper.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

## Citation

Suggested citation:

> [Author names], “Beyond Statistical Significance: Severity Analysis in Follow-on Damages Cases”, working paper.

## Contact

For questions or comments, please contact the authors.

## Version

This is the first public version of the companion website. Future versions will add visual storytelling and an interactive severity calculator.
